user_prompt: Draft a response to a customer asking why their feature request from 6 months ago is still open.
actual_output:
**Priority:** MEDIUM
**Category:** Feature Request - Follow-up

**Draft response:**

Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you for reaching out and following up on your feature request. I completely understand it can be frustrating to wait for an update, especially since it has been 6 months since you first shared this idea with us. 

I've taken a look at our internal tracker, and your request is still open and actively logged with our product team. While I don't have a specific timeline or guarantee for when this might be built, please know that our team reviews these requests regularly to help prioritize our upcoming roadmap. 

I have added a fresh note to your request to let the product team know you are still actively looking for this functionality. 

If this missing feature is currently blocking a specific workflow for you, please let me know! I would be happy to look into potential workarounds or alternative solutions you can use in the meantime. 

Best regards,

Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the task as a support-related response drafting exercise and provided a high-quality, empathetic draft that followed its internal guidelines.
